scripts.deploy: pnpm build && pnpm exec wrangler deploy
scripts.dev: pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute job-store --command="DROP TABLE IF EXISTS jobs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS companies; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS crawler_runs; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS job_detail_runs;" && pnpm exec wrangler d1 execute job-store --file=../../../packages/db/schema.sql && pnpm exec wrangler dev
scripts.migrate: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply job-store --remote
scripts.migrate:local: pnpm exec wrangler d1 migrations apply job-store
